title: RefactorSweepOutput
description: Plan artifact produced by the refactor command's planning sweep. Written by refactor sweep CLI before execution threads spawn; read by the command to decide skip/re-refactor/refactor per object.

epoch.description: Unix epoch seconds at which the sweep was run.

objects.description: One entry per FQN in the batch.

shared_staging_candidates.description: Source table FQNs referenced by 2+ objects in this batch.

fqn.description: Fully-qualified object name (e.g. silver.DimCustomer or silver.vw_active_customers).

object_type.description: Whether this object is a table (backed by a procedure) or a view.

writer.description: Selected writer procedure FQN from scoping.selected_writer. Null for views.

refactor_status.description: Current refactor.status from the procedure or view catalog. Null if no refactor section exists.

source_tables.description: Source tables read by the writer procedure or view.

existing_stg_models.description: Names of stg_*.sql files already on disk for this object's source tables.

existing_mart_model.description: Path of the mart model SQL file if it already exists on disk, else null.

recommended_action.description: skip = refactor.status is ok. re-refactor = refactor.status is partial. refactor = no status or error.
